programme.desc: The last of the groups and arguably the most competitive with Great Britain's, Highland Oak, Luke Stoltman, hunting a 6th Grand Final appearance going up against 2024 podium finisher Evan 'The T-Rex' Singleton. The final two placings in the Grand Final are up for grabs across five grueling tests of strength: The Loading Medley featuring a Cyber Truck, the iconic WSM Deadlift for reps, an almighty Overhead Press Medley, the Titan's Toss and a show stopping Natural Stone Medley await - with every lift, press, carry and load critical as performances in the heats will carry points through for the two men who make it through to the final. programme.title: ABBA, The Carpenters & Dolly Parton: The Unseen Tapes
programme.desc: ABBA, The Carpenters and Dolly Parton were three of the world's most successful musical acts who rose to prominence during the early 1970s. This special programme features rare performance footage of all three, previously unseen by British viewers. Featured in the programme are ABBA's hits Mamma Mia, Dancing Queen, SOS, Waterloo and Fernando. The Carpenters were America's biggest selling artists of the Seventies, and featured are performances of Close to You, Top of the World and Superstar. And Dolly Parton's rise to superstardom began when she broadened her fanbase beyond country music. Featured are performances of Jolene, I Will Always Love You and Here You Come Again. Featuring analysis from Tony Blackburn, Johnny Logan, Glen Matlock, Mike Batt, Paul Gambaccini, Joan Armatrading, Bob Harris and Ben Earle. Exec Prod: Mark Wells; Dir: Mark Wells; Double Yellow Entertainment

programme.title: Big Jake
programme.desc: John Wayne is Big Jake McCandles, on the trail on bandits in this action drama that stretches from Texas to Mexico. It's 1909, and the Old West is giving way to modern times. When the outlaw gang led bu vicious John Fain (Boone) raids Jake's ranch and kidnaps his 8-year-old grandson, Jake's wife (Maureen O'Hara), whom he hasn't seen in 18 years, sends for her husband to rescue the boy. While the law gives chase in rickety automobiles, Jake saddles up with an Indian scout, a faithful dog, and a box of money. But paying ransom isn't Jake's idea of good old frontier justice.
